Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: sketching out a Petri net workflow with distinct places representing each stage of a registration and verification process starting from initial submission through to final notification

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The key design includes a loop where the RDS re documentation submission step can send applicants back to the registered state to repeat document verification with all transitions clearly labeled to track the flow

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: adding an investigation and improvement loop where the fraud check can loop back through investigation steps allowing multiple rounds of scrutiny

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: For the approval stage I am incorporating an optional silent transition that skips approval entirely if the transaction amount falls below a threshold making the model more realistic

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: I will set initial and final markings add explanatory comments and then generate the complete code with final output printing
